items.summary: 개요 안랩은 2026년 3월 한 달간 국내 타깃을 대상으로 한 APT 공격을 모니터링했다. 대부분의 공격은 특정 대상에 대한 정찰 후 발송된 Spear Phishing 이메일을 통해 시작되었다. APT 국내 공격 동향 대부분의 유포 매개체는 바로가기(.lnk) 파일이며 LNK 기반 공격 비중이 가장 높았다. Type A는 LNK로 파워쉘을 실행해 curl.exe 복사본으로 AutoIt 악성코

items.title: 2026년 3월 피싱 이메일 동향 보고서

items.title: Microsoft Patches 138 Vulnerabilities, Including DNS and Netlogon RCE Flaws

items.title: GemStuffer Abuses 150+ RubyGems to Exfiltrate Scraped U.K. Council Portal Data
items.summary: Cybersecurity researchers are calling attention to a new campaign dubbed GemStuffer that has targeted the RubyGems repository with more than 150 gems that use the registry as a data exfiltration channel rather than for m

items.title: Windows BitLocker zero-day gives access to protected drives, PoC released
items.summary: A cybersecurity researcher has published proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits for two unpatched Microsoft Windows vulnerabilities named YellowKey and GreenPlasma, which are a BitLocker bypass and a privilege-escalation flaw.

items.title: Android Adds Intrusion Logging for Sophisticated Spyware Forensics
items.summary: Google on Tuesday unveiled a new opt-in Android feature called Intrusion Logging for storing forensic logs to better analyze sophisticated spyware attacks. Intrusion Logging, available as part of Advanced Protection Mode

items.title: Webinar tomorrow: Why security alone won't stop modern attacks
items.summary: Tomorrow's webinar examines why prevention alone is no longer enough against modern cyberattacks. The session explores how organizations combine security, backups, and recovery planning to improve cyber resilience after

items.title: Microsoft fixes BitLocker recovery issue only for Windows 11 users
items.summary: Microsoft has addressed a known issue causing some Windows 11 systems to boot into BitLocker recovery after installing the April 2026 Windows security updates. [...]

items.title: Microsoft fixes Windows Autopatch bug installing restricted drivers
items.summary: Microsoft has fixed a Windows Autopatch bug that caused driver updates restricted by administrative policies to be deployed on some Autopatch-managed Windows devices in the European Union. [...]

items.title: Foxconn confirms cyberattack claimed by Nitrogen ransomware gang
items.summary: Foxconn, the world's largest electronics manufacturer, says some of its North American factories are now working to resume normal operations after a cyberattack. [...]

items.title: 73 Seconds to Breach, 24 Hours to Patch: The Case for Autonomous Validation
items.summary: Attackers can compromise systems in minutes while patching and response still take hours or days. Picus Security breaks down why autonomous validation is becoming critical for modern defense strategies. [...]

items.title: Microsoft says some users can't install Office on Windows 365 devices
items.summary: Microsoft says some customers are experiencing issues downloading and installing Office on their Windows 365 devices. [...]

items.title: New Exim BDAT Vulnerability Exposes GnuTLS Builds to Potential Code Execution

items.title: RubyGems Suspends New Signups After Hundreds of Malicious Packages Are Uploaded
